Off Calendar Jul-24-2003 Off Calendar

Dpu Scd 218 At 9:00 Am. On June 12, 2003.
Off Calendar Jun-17-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This casuse came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S, Ravinantapricha, CSR: Valerie Papale.
Appearances:
Fred Keeperman, Esq. for Plaintiff The National Collection Agency, Inc., present by the President; Don Robertson, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants Tony Lo and Robert Lo.
Principal of $72,576.79
Attorney's fees of $2,825.00
Costs of $359.50
Interest of $9,037.54. For the total of $84,798.83
Judgment signed in open court.
